art_a: The sentence contains at least one digit.
art_b: Every word in the sentence starts with the same letter.
FF: The morning sun warmed our quiet kitchen.
She poured fresh coffee into my favorite mug.
We walked along the river before breakfast.
His old dog barked at passing cars.
Could you please hand me that blue towel?
They planted yellow flowers near the fence.
My brother fixed the broken garden gate.
A gentle breeze moved through the open window.
Where did you leave the spare keys?
Our neighbors invited us for dinner tonight.
The children built a sandcastle by the shore.
I forgot to buy milk and eggs.
Bright stars filled the clear night sky.
He whispered something funny during the meeting.
Let us meet under the big oak tree.
Several birds gathered around the empty feeder.
She wrote a kind letter to her teacher.
We caught the early train without trouble.
His jacket smelled of smoke and rain.
Please turn off the lights before leaving.
Many tourists climbed the steep mountain path.
A small frog jumped across the muddy road.
They danced quietly under the soft moonlight.
My grandmother bakes delicious bread every Sunday.
TF: I woke up at 7 and made coffee.
She bought 3 apples from the market.
We arrived around 5 in the evening.
There are 4 cats sleeping on the porch.
He paid 20 dollars for the ticket.
I read 2 books during the holiday.
They planted 6 trees in the yard.
